a request for a user profile

body.query:
query GetUserProfile($id: ID!) {
  getUserProfile(id: $id) {
    id
    name
    username
    email
    bio
    languages
    favourites
    likes
    followers
    follows
    views
  }
}

interactions.description: a request to update script details

body.query:
mutation UpdateScript($scriptId: ID!, $title: String, $description: String, $visibility: String, $genres: [String], $languages: [String]) {
  updateScript(
    scriptId: $scriptId
    title: $title
    description: $description
    visibility: $visibility
    genres: $genres
    languages: $languages
  ) {
    id
    title
    description
    visibility
    genres
    languages
  }
}
